name: TripoSG
description: High-quality image-to-3D via flow matching diffusion. Sharper geometry and finer details than TripoSR. Requires ~8GB VRAM.
author: Lightning Pixel

models.name: TripoSG
models.description: Flow matching diffusion model for high-quality single-image 3D reconstruction (~8GB)

params_schema.label: Inference Steps
params_schema.tooltip: Number of diffusion steps. More steps = better quality but slower.

params_schema.label: CFG Scale
params_schema.tooltip: Classifier-free guidance strength. Higher = closer to the input image.

params_schema.label: Foreground Ratio
params_schema.tooltip: How much of the canvas the subject fills after background removal.

params_schema.label: Max Faces
params_schema.tooltip: Target face count for mesh simplification. -1 to disable.

params_schema.label: Seed
params_schema.tooltip: Seed for reproducibility. Click shuffle for a random seed.

params_schema.label: Decoder
params_schema.tooltip: DiffDMC is faster and produces a watertight mesh. Marching Cubes handles complex geometries better.
